narrative:
Precinct Center South (precinct in Williams County) has 871 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.5 percentage points.
